appointment.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Initial Zoom Call, Property Tour…

ai.safety: The AI only creates drafts. Nothing is sent automatically. You review, correct and approve – then copy the text and send it as usual. The system learns from your approvals and corrections.
ai.inboundPh: What did the customer write? Paste here or adopt above…
ai.unavailableBody: The AI draft generator is set up but not yet live. Once you give the go-ahead it gets activated – then this button works. Until then everything stays a pure draft workflow.
ai.savedApproved: Approved & copied – the system learns from it
ai.savedEdited: Approved (corrected) & copied – the system learns from it
ai.historyTitle: Previous AI replies for this lead
ai.historyEmpty: No AI drafts for this lead yet.

aiAgent.title: AI Reply Agent
aiAgent.subtitle: Drafts for incoming customer messages – you review and approve. The system learns from your approvals and corrections.
aiAgent.step1: In the lead under “🤖 AI Reply”, adopt the incoming customer message and generate a draft.
aiAgent.step2: Review the draft, correct it if needed.
aiAgent.step3: Approve & copy – you send the text yourself as usual (WhatsApp/email).
aiAgent.step4: The system remembers your approved/corrected replies and improves over time.
aiAgent.autopilotOnDesc: The “fully automatic” preference is saved. Automatic sending is NOT live yet, though – nothing is sent without your approval.
aiAgent.autopilotOffDesc: Off: The AI only creates drafts. You approve every reply yourself.
aiAgent.confirmOn: Save full automation as a preference? Note: This does NOT send anything automatically. Automatic sending only becomes active after explicit activation in the backend – until then everything stays in draft mode.
aiAgent.safety: Safety: This switch only stores your preference. Even when on, the system currently sends NOTHING automatically – automatic sending only becomes active after explicit activation in the backend. This way nothing can go out to real customers by accident.
aiAgent.dfConfirm: From now on, ~45 minutes after the FIRST deck view an automatic WhatsApp goes to the customer (favourite? + booking link). These are REAL messages to real customers. Arm it now?
aiAgent.dfOn: ✅ Deck follow-up is armed — WhatsApp sends automatically
aiAgent.dfOnDesc: ARMED: ~45 min after the first deck view an automatic WhatsApp goes to the customer — business hours only (8–21), once per lead. Cancels itself once the customer books an appointment or replies "not interested".
aiAgent.dfOffDesc: Off: nothing is sent. When on, an automatic WhatsApp ~45 min after the first deck view asks for the favourite and offers a booking link — your lever from the 1st to the 2nd call.
aiAgent.dfMessage:
Hey [First name], just checking in 🙂 Did you get a chance to look through the properties? Which one appeals to you most?

If you like, let’s take 15 minutes and I’ll answer all your open questions — you can pick a slot directly here: calendly.com/sven-happy-property/30min

Best, Sven
aiAgent.dfLiveWarn: Active: REAL WhatsApp messages go to real customers. To stop, switch it back off.
aiAgent.dfSafety: Safety: while this switch is off, nothing is scheduled and nothing is sent. Only turning it on (with a confirmation) arms the automatic sending.
aiAgent.botConfirm: From now on the appointment bot AUTOMATICALLY chats with real customers via WhatsApp, proposes times and books them in your calendar — on no-show, first contact and deck view. IMPORTANT: your Google Calendar must be shared with the service address, otherwise the bot cannot see your free times. Arm it now?
aiAgent.botOnDesc: ARMED: on no-show, first contact and deck view the bot messages the customer on WhatsApp, proposes 2 free slots (German time), understands the reply, checks your calendar and books — incl. confirmation. Asks Zoom or WhatsApp call.
aiAgent.botOffDesc: Off: the bot does not write. When on, it takes the scheduling off the customer’s plate — proposes times, books them in your calendar and confirms. Your lever to turn interest into a second call.
aiAgent.botStep1: Bot: “I could do Saturday 17:00 or Monday 12:00 (German time) — what suits you?”
aiAgent.botStep2: Customer picks → bot asks: Zoom or a quick WhatsApp call?
aiAgent.botStep3: Customer can’t → bot asks day + morning/afternoon, checks the calendar, proposes a new slot
aiAgent.botStep4: Appointment gets booked (calendar + Zoom link) + confirmation is sent. If confused: hands over to you.
aiAgent.botCalendarNote: Prerequisite: your Google Calendar must be shared with the service address (Settings → Integrations), otherwise the bot cannot see your free times.
aiAgent.botLiveWarn: Active: the bot has REAL WhatsApp conversations with real customers and books real appointments. To stop, switch it back off.

rechnung.notFound: This calculation could not be found.
rechnung.disclaimerText: Non-binding information, not tax, legal, or financial advice. All figures without guarantee. IRR = internal rate of return on invested equity (annual). As of: {{date}}.
rechnung.hotelConceptNote: Management provides full hotel service including cleaning, check-in, marketing & 24/7 guest support.
rechnung.cashflowNote: The cashflow shows actual income after all costs, loan payments, and taxes. Positive values indicate a surplus from the property. The one-time VAT refund is shown separately.
rechnung.tableBLoanEquity: Table B – Loan / Equity / Values (10 Years)
rechnung.equityNote: Equity results from property value minus remaining debt. Through appreciation and repayment, equity grows substantially over time.
rechnung.rentYieldTitle: Rental Yield (%) – Based on Net Purchase Price

automationRules.pageSubtitle: Automatic email + WhatsApp messages triggered by CRM events
automationRules.simulateAllTitle: Render all active automations without sending
automationRules.howItWorksBody: On every CRM event (lead created, stage change),
automationRules.howItWorksBody2: is called. The function reads active rules, renders templates with lead data, and creates scheduled messages. The scheduler
automationRules.howItWorksBody3: runs every 5 minutes and sends due messages via email (Ionos SMTP) and/or WhatsApp (Timelines API).
automationRules.noRulesYet: No rules yet. Click "+ New rule".
automationRules.confirmDeleteRule: Really delete this rule? Pending scheduled messages will be kept.

rechnerWizard.objectsUnchangedHint: Properties stay the same — just change the values below and save.
rechnerWizard.hotelConceptHint: Management handles the complete hotel service
rechnerWizard.applyVatPrepayButton: Apply VAT refund as special amortization
rechnerWizard.specialAmortizationHint: Special amortization payments per year (€) reduce the remaining debt and increase equity. For short-term rentals, the one-time VAT refund can be applied automatically as a special amortization payment.
rechnerWizard.editHint: Change values → Save updates the same calculation.
rechnerWizard.autoPriceHint: Purchase price per unit is pulled automatically from the CRM.

templates.claudePromptIntro: Create a professional HTML email template for a German real-estate investment firm (Happy Property, Cyprus). Category: {{category}}. Color: #ff795d (orange). Design: modern, professional, responsive. Subject: "{{subject}}".
templates.claudePromptOutro: Use these placeholders where appropriate: {{placeholders}}. Return only the HTML code, no explanations.

pipeline.holdSetActivity: Set to hold. Follow-up every 6 weeks: {{yesNo}}.
pipeline.handoverContactsNotFound: Burkhard/Ioulia not found in business contacts
pipeline.handoverActivitySubject: Contact handed off to Burkhard + Ioulia
pipeline.registrationActivity: Stage changed: {{from}} → registration. Registration sent to: {{developers}}{{noteBlock}}

objekte.newUnitHint: A new unit will be created automatically in the CRM on save — fill in the details below.
objekte.rentalTypeHint: Must be set at the latest when releasing the property for management.
objekte.credentialsSentTo: Login credentials were sent automatically to {{email}}.

invoices.pageSubtitle: Create, download, and send invoices. Issuer: sveru ltd (Happy Property).
invoices.errNoLineItems: At least one line item with description and amount is required.

projects.noDevelopersHint: No developers added yet → CRM → Settings → Add developer
projects.equipmentPlaceholder: e.g. air conditioning, pool, smart home, underground parking…

verwaltungen.title: Management Companies
verwaltungen.subtitle: Manage property management companies and contacts
verwaltungen.deleteConfirmBody: Assigned properties will not be deleted — only the assignment will be removed.

leadAngebote.footerHint: Links stay valid permanently. ✏️ = edit deck via chat (runs in background, color changes when done). ✓ = confirm as done.

unitPickerModal.title: Select unit
unitPickerModal.searchPlaceholder: Search project, block, or unit number…

deckChat.title: Edit deck
deckChat.instructions: Tell the AI in your own words what should change — e.g. "swap the cover photo for the pool photo", "make the intro shorter and more personal", "move the payment plan further up", "emphasize the paragraph on the 5-year guarantee". The link stays the same.
deckChat.inputPlaceholder: What should change on the deck?
deckChat.backgroundHint: Runs in the background — you can review the next deck right away. Once done, the deck button changes color in the offer list.
deckChat.undoSuccess: Undone — reload the deck link to see the change.

postausgang.deckChatTitle: Adjust deck via chat (runs in the background)

constructionPhotos.notifyEmailSubject: New file in your Happy Property portal
constructionPhotos.notifyEmailBody:
Hello {{firstName}},

A new construction photo has been uploaded for your property: {{fileName}}

You can view it anytime in your personal portal.

Best regards,
Your Happy Property Team

stageMessages.eventDesc_portal_access: Access credentials email to new users/owners (login + password). Sent automatically on account creation and "Send portal access".
stageMessages.eventNote_portal_access: Please keep {{password}} and {{login_url}} in the text — otherwise the system automatically falls back to the built-in security email.

portal_access.label: Portal activation (login credentials)
portal_access.desc: Sent automatically to new users/owners (login + password) — on account creation and "Send portal access".
portal_access.note: Please keep {{password}} and {{login_url}} in the template — otherwise the system will automatically fall back to sending the built-in security email.
